prompt: Write a 400-word valuation justification for openpatent.ai at $50M pre / $65M post. Cover: (1) the comparable-company analysis — Anaqua (sold to Astorg 2024 at 8.4× ARR, ~$420M), PatentBolt (acqui-hired 2019 at 6.1× forward ARR, ~$58M), Clarivate (public at 5.2× ARR, ~$8.2B), Impartner (private, last round 7.1× ARR), (2) the comparable-transaction analysis — IPfolio sold to CPA Global 2020 at 6.8× forward ARR, (3) the bottom-up build — at $52.4M projected yr5 ARR × 7.5× = $393M exit value, discounted back 4 years at 35% cost of equity = $117M post-money today, (4) the 5-LOCK premium — 3 of 5 LOCKS are compound (regulatory + BFT + data-sovereignty cannot be replicated under $50M and 3yrs of effort), justify a 1.8× premium over pure ARR-multiple math, (5) the comparable-token-anchored plays (BTC Inc, Block.one pre-Bullish, Galaxis) trade at 12-22× forward ARR due to digital-asset tailwinds, (6) the final mark — $50M pre sits 38% below the bottom-up $117M and 18% below the comparable multiple, leaving 50%+ upside on a 24-month hold. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {comparable_companies:[5 strings], comparable_transactions:[2 strings], bottom_up_post_money_usd:float, lock_premium_multiple:float, token_anchored_multiples:[2 numbers], final_mark_usd:float, upside_pct:float}.
